name: mrlynn--voyageai-skill
description: Voyage AI embedding and reranking CLI integrated with MongoDB Atlas Vector Search. Use for: generating text embeddings, reranking search results, storing embeddings in Atlas, performing vector similarity search, creating vector search indexes, listing available models, comparing text similarity, bulk ingestion, interactive demos, and learning about AI concepts. Triggers: embed text, generate embeddings, vector search, rerank documents, voyage ai, semantic search, similarity search, store embeddings, atlas vector search, embedding models, cosine similarity, bulk ingest, explain embeddings.
